shared_focus = {
    id = SHARED_ROOT
    x = 0
    y = 0
}

joint_focus = {
    id = JOINT_ALPHA
    x = 1
    y = 2
}

    id = test_tree
    shared_focus = JOINT_ALPHA
    inlay_window = {
        id = test_inlay
        position = { x = 150 y = 275 }
    }
    focus = {
        id = ROOT_FOCUS
        x = 0
        y = 0
    }
}
